name: Southern Biscuit Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
2. Break up any lumps in the mixture.
3. Work the butter into the dry ingredients by hand until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
4. Make sure no lumps remain.
5. Gradually stir in the milk, mixing just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Do not overbeat the batter.
7. Spoon the batter into 12 greased muffin cups.
8. Bake at 350°F until golden brown, about 35 to 40 minutes.
9. The finished muffins should have a thick crust with a cakelike center.
